key_modifications: Replaced hardcoded zellij_session format `bop-{card_id}` with environment-driven `ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME`
Added fallback to `pmr` default when env var not present
Separated meta updates into two conditional blocks with individual `write_meta` calls

patterns_discovered.description: Uses `std::env::var(...).unwrap_or_else()` to read ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME with hardcoded default 'pmr'
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables environment-driven configuration while maintaining backward compatibility

patterns_discovered.description: Both session and pane fields are set only when `.is_none()`, preventing overwrites
patterns_discovered.significance: Preserves existing values if already set earlier in dispatch flow

patterns_discovered.description: Separate `write_meta` calls after session update and after pane update
patterns_discovered.significance: Atomic persistence but potentially inefficient for multiple field updates

patterns_discovered.description: Uses card name directly as Zellij pane identifier
patterns_discovered.significance: Creates 1:1 mapping between cards and panes for traceability

gotchas_discovered.description: Both `write_meta` calls use `let _ =` silently ignoring I/O failures
gotchas_discovered.risk: Metadata may fail to persist without operator awareness; subsequent dispatcher runs won't see session/pane context
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider logging errors or propagating them up for visibility

gotchas_discovered.description: Dispatcher now depends on ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME being set by launcher context
gotchas_discovered.risk: If not set, falls back to 'pmr' - multiple concurrent dispatch runs will collide on same session
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document requirement in dispatch.nu and Auto-Claude run.py entry points

gotchas_discovered.description: Two separate `write_meta` calls in same block instead of batched update
gotchas_discovered.risk: I/O cost doubles if many cards processed; potential race condition between writes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Batch both updates into single struct before single `write_meta` call

gotchas_discovered.description: Card name used as pane name directly - if card names aren't globally unique within session
gotchas_discovered.risk: Zellij pane creation could fail or overwrite existing pane
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Validate card names are unique or use composite key like `session:card_id`

requirements_met: Sets zellij_session in meta.json with env value or 'pmr' fallback
Sets zellij_pane in meta.json to card name
outcome_details.tests_status: Not mentioned in commit; assume covered by existing harness

recommendations.recommendation: Replace `let _ = write_meta(...)` with error logging to detect metadata persistence failures
recommendations.rationale: Current silent failure could leave cards in inconsistent state

recommendations.recommendation: Batch zellij_session and zellij_pane updates into single struct before calling write_meta once
recommendations.rationale: Reduces I/O overhead and eliminates race window between two writes

recommendations.recommendation: Document that dispatch.nu and Auto-Claude run.py MUST set ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME before invoking dispatcher
recommendations.rationale: Clarifies contract for callers; prevents accidental session collisions

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding collision detection for pane names within session before assignment
recommendations.rationale: Defensive programming for multi-card scenarios; prevents silent Zellij API failures
